name: sommelier
description: Verification-gated orchestration skills — turn a big task into a PRD + file-scoped parallel tickets, pair each with the cheapest model tier that passes, and gate merges on re-measured evidence. Self-tested across four rounds; its verification rule is the one claim proven to beat a placebo (hidden-pytest, p<=1e-4). Broader speed/orchestration claims stay unproven, and every round is published.
